title: Highway Resort
desc: A bride-to-be is abducted for ransom just before her wedding. During captivity, she forms an uneasy bond with her kidnapper, testing loyalties, love, and safety.

title: Akaash Vani
desc: After her lover Akaash departs to study abroad, Vani marries abusive Ravi under societal pressure. Her life suffers until a college reunion rekindles lost love.

title: Crime Stories
desc: Crime Stories uncovers real-life investigations, revealing shocking crimes, suspects, and twists as detectives chase truth and justice through evidence, interviews, and hidden motives.

title: Raman Raghav 2.0
desc: Ramanna, a disturbed serial killer, finds a strange connection with Raghavan, the police officer chasing him, blurring the lines between right and wrong, guilt and understanding.

desc: Best friends Aditya and Anushka remain unaware of their love for each other until jealousy surfaces at Aditya's wedding, forcing them to confront their true feelings.

title: Kites
desc: A mesmerizing love story unfolds as two hearts from different worlds fight to stay together against all odds.Love knows no boundaries in this emotional, gripping tale.

title: Sankat City
desc: Guru is an automobile thief and Ganpat his partner. They steals a Mercedes belonging to Faujdar, a criminal don who loans people big money.

title: Traffic Signal
desc: Silsila, a street-smart hustler managing trades at a Mumbai traffic signal, sees his world shatter when he unknowingly becomes an accomplice to a murder.

title: Mantra
desc: A professor decides to buy an allegedly haunted ancestral property on the condition that someone stays there. A local goon spends three months in the house in a bid to earn a quick profit.
